heading: Tax return preparers
label: 7427 Tax return preparers
text: In any proceeding involving the issue of whether or not a tax return preparer has willfully attempted in any manner to understate the liability for tax (within the meaning of section 6694(b)), the burden of proof in respect to such issue shall be upon the Secretary.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7427 was renumbered 7437 of this title.
Amendments2007— substituted “Tax return preparers” for “Income tax return preparers” in section catchline and “a tax return preparer” for “an income tax return preparer” in text.Pub. L. 110–28

Effective Date of 2007 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to returns prepared after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 110–28section 8246(c) of Pub. L. 110–28section 6060 of this titleMay 25, 2007
